input:
This was all agreed in absolute secrecy. Carrying out his plan, ʿUmayr was in Madinah in a few days, entering the mosque to meet the Prophet. When he mentioned his pretext for being there, the Prophet related to him word for word his secret conversation with Ṣafwān. ʿUmayr was overwhelmed and declared that no one but a messenger from God could have known his secret. He accepted Islam, remained in Madinah and fought with the Muslims in all subsequent major battles.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

characters.name: ʿUmayr ibn al-Humam
characters.appearance: Late 20s, dark skin, athletic build, short black beard. Wearing a simple white thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals.

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible.

output.moral_lesson: The sincerity of a person's faith is often revealed when they are surprised by someone's knowledge of their innermost thoughts.
output.narrative_text: ʿUmayr was amazed that the Prophet knew the secret he had shared with Ṣafwān. He realized that only a messenger from God could have known this, and he accepted Islam.

compliance.notes: The Prophet is shown from behind, as per Islamic depiction rules. ʿUmayr is shown with a full face, looking amazed. The scene is calm and respectful, suitable for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Interior of a modest 7th century Makkah mud-brick mosque. A slender older Arab man with medium build, white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing near the mihrab. In the distance, a young Arab man with dark skin, athletic build, short black beard, off-white thobe and brown cloak, entering from the doorway, looking amazed and taking a step forward. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
